title: Smoky Tender Malaysian Tofu Curry
description: A kid-friendly Malaysian dish featuring smoky and tender tofu in a rich and flavorful curry sauce, made with tinned tomatoes and infused oil.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the infused oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tinned tomatoes, coconut milk, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the tofu and simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the tofu is tender.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
